## What does this PR do?

## Type of change
- [ ] New detection rule
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Rule improvement (fewer false positives/negatives)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added for new rules (both true-positive and false-positive)
- [ ] All tests pass (`PYTHONPATH=src python tests/test_scanner.py`)
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or justified if so)
- [ ] Rule documented with ID, description, severity logic
